seo.title: Fly Labs | The Vibe Building Hub
seo.description: Tools, templates, and ideas for one-person builders. AI-scored idea pipeline, prompt library, open source templates. Built by one person with AI.

hero.headline: The vibe building hub.
hero.subheadline: Open source tools for one-person builders. AI-scored ideas, prompts, templates, and everything I build along the way.

pillars.title: What's inside
pillars.subtitle: Every project here started as a real problem I had. Built with AI, shipped open source.

ideasLab.title: Ideas Lab
ideasLab.description: Real problems from {{sourceCount}} sources. {{questionCount}} questions. One verdict.

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.description: Copy-paste AI prompts for coding, writing, and thinking. Built from workflows I actually use.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Automation templates that connect your favorite tools. Set them up once, save hours every week.

microTools.title: Micro Tools
microTools.description: Small, focused apps that do one thing really well. Open them, use them, done.

library.title: Library
library.description: Free ebooks from my study notes. AI, business, mindset, and the random stuff I can't stop learning about.

flybot.title: FlyBot
flybot.description: Describe what you're building. FlyBot pulls up similar ideas it already scored, flags the gaps, and tells you if it's worth your weekend.

cycle.title: The vibe building cycle
cycle.subtitle: See a real problem. Build a solution with AI. Share it openly. Each project feeds the next one.

ideation.title: Ideation
ideation.description: Real problems from Reddit, X, Product Hunt, GitHub, and more. AI asks four questions about each one. You pick the best ones.

build.title: Build
build.description: Pick your tools, ship fast, document what breaks. One person with AI can build what used to require a team.

share.title: Share
share.description: Open source the code, write about the process, put it out there. Feedback from real people sharpens everything.

compound.title: Compound
compound.description: Skills stack, tools compound, each project sharpens the next one. Yesterday's side quest becomes tomorrow's shortcut.

newsletter.title: From the newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: I write about what I build, what breaks, and what I learn along the way. Always free.

closing.headline: One person. AI. Spare time.
closing.text: I document what I build, what breaks, and what I learn along the way. The newsletter covers the process. Everything else lives here.
